sg_weights._note: TPC River Highlands: Par-70, 6820y, short birdie-fest on bentgrass. APP dominant (150-200y fairway bucket = 0.24 of shots). PUTT elevated on fast bentgrass (stimp 12.0). ARG moderate — light rough (0.95") means fewer scrambling penalties but still counts. OTT slightly depressed — accuracy and placement matter more than raw distance on this short layout. Course in COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY (event_id=34); Apollo will use approach bucket weights directly.

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights. Travelers is annual with rich course history (event_id=34, played every year). Expect HIGH field coverage (>70%). Full 0.22 courseFit weight appropriate.

course_history_note: Travelers Championship has been at TPC River Highlands consistently under event_id=34 for many years. DataGolf should have 7-9 years of round-level data (2017-2025). No fallback mapping needed. Expect 70%+ field coverage in Apollo Phase 1.
winner_archetype: Short-game wizard and iron player who converts on fast bentgrass. TPC River Highlands rewards complete ball-strikers who can attack pins — low rough means approach accuracy translates to makeable birdie putts. Prototypical winner: top-50 globally, strong sg_app (especially 150-200y), positive sg_putt on bentgrass, good make-cut probability in birdie-fest format. Historical winners include Cantlay, Woodland, DeChambeau, Straka, Burns (2022) — mix of elite ball-strikers and opportunistic scorers. OTT matters less than usual; the course plays short and wide.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Standard individual BBI v8.5 rankings. Annual event at consistent venue with rich course history. Expect full field (~144 players), high course history coverage (70%+). Standard weight configuration appropriate.
course_notes: TPC River Highlands, Cromwell CT (near Hartford). Par-70, ~6820y, bentgrass throughout. Light rough (under 1"). Fast greens (stimp ~12). Short course rewards scoring — expects -15 to -20 winning score in normal conditions. Historically a weather-influenced event (wind off Connecticut River can change scoring). Event has rich PGA Tour history under event_id=34 (2017-2025 all at same venue). Past champions include Cantlay (2021), Woodland (2019), DeChambeau (2018), Burns (2022), Straka (2023). Players with strong Travelers history are genuine courseFit signals.
